title: Product Thinking: Maximum Value, No Bloat
text: Deliver maximum value product without bloating it with features. Every feature must justify existence. The Garden stays read-only (browse + rate), chat stays as capture + enrichment layer. Don't add features for features's sake.

title: US Team Energy & FDE Bridge Opportunity
text: Showcased solution to US team — incredibly receptive and positive energy. Partnering with German startup for field sales. Wants to cross the pond: coffee chats with US product builders, bring on-the-ground insights from Germany partnership. Approach humbly but own the field perspective.
